subcodes.first_line: This is the Book sent down in truth from the presence of a Sovereign of manifest glory - verily there is no doubt therein; it is a guidance unto all the worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذلک الکتاب نزل بالحق من لدن سلطان عز مبینا انه لا ریب فیه هدی للعالمین جمیعا
subcodes.subjects: @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
